title: GMS Week 33 - TIME FLIES…
summary:
Main
in Weekly Demolition Reports 18/08/2025
Image reference: 2025-08-18_gms-week-33-time-flies_img1.jpg
…but misery clearly doesn't. We're already inserting September tides for 2025 into the GMS Weekly and things that wereexpected to have smoothened out once 2024 had come to pass, clearly have only gotten worse ever since the White House decided tweets are the best way to implement global diplomacy and worse yet, global trade policy. All the tariffs aside, the biggest news of the week came between the meeting of President Putin with Trump in Alaska as global markets keenly await the outcome of their "talks" in order to ease the ongoing drama over oil sanctions and the Ukraine war.
